Appearances:
Plaintiff, San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Len Voom.
Attorney, Bill Ford, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Sharon Buckner, is present.
Defendant is in pro per.
The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of SEP-07-2010 remains on calendar.
